basic_details.job_title: NVS Patna Teaching & Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS), Regional Office Patna
basic_details.post_name: PGTs, TGTs, Creative Teachers & Staff Nurse (Contractual)
basic_details.short_information: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS), Regional Office Patna has invited online applications for engagement of PGTs, TGTs, Creative Teachers and Staff Nurse on a purely contractual basis in Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalayas (JNVs) under Patna Region for the academic session 2026-27. The recruitment is for JNVs located in the states of Bihar, Jharkhand and West Bengal. Eligible and interested candidates can submit their applications online from 08 May 2026 to 15 May 2026. Selected candidates will be engaged on contract basis and posted in any JNV under Patna Region. It is mandatory for selected teachers to

age_limit.details: PGTs / TGTs / Creative Teachers: Maximum 50 years as on 01 June 2026. Female Staff Nurse: Not exceeding 35 years as on 01 June 2026. Ex-NVS Superannuated Teachers: Maximum 65 years as on 01 June 2026.

qualification.details: For PGTs: | Master’s Degree in concerned subject with at least 50% marks + B.Ed. from NCTE recognized institution. Proficiency in teaching in English & Hindi medium. | For TGTs: | Bachelor’s Degree with concerned subject + B.Ed. with minimum 50% marks. Qualified in CTET (Paper-II). | For Staff Nurse: | B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing + Registration with State Nursing Council + 2½ years experience in minimum 50-bedded hospital. | Desirable Qualifications (common for most posts): | Experience in residential / Navodaya schools. Knowledge of Computer Applications. Proficiency in regional languages.

how_to_apply: Visit Official Portal Go to www.trschooms.in (link will be activated on NVS RO Patna website).
Register & Fill Application Register with valid email ID and mobile number. Fill personal, educational and experience details carefully.
Upload Documents Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, educational certificates, experience certificates, CTET certificate, caste certificate (if applicable) etc.
Submit Application Review the form and submit online before 15 May 2026. Take printout of the submitted application.

Prepare for Personal Interaction Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for document verification and personal interaction scheduled between 21 to 23 May 2026 at designated JNVs (Rajgir, Ranchi & Paschim Burdwan).
Attend Personal Interaction Report at the allotted venue with all original documents and self-attested photocopies on the scheduled date.
important_instructions: Engagement is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular appointment. Selected candidates must reside in the JNV campus. State-wise merit list will be prepared for posting. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Visit NVS RO Patna website regularly for updates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 15 May 2026. Candidates must complete the registration process within this period as no applications will be accepted after the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What posts are available in NVS Patna Region Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes PGTs, TGTs, Creative Teachers, Special Educators, Vocational Teachers and Staff Nurse posts. These vacancies are available across Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalayas in Bihar, Jharkhand and West Bengal.

faq.question: Q3. Is the NVS Teacher Recruitment 2026 permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The engagement is purely on a contractual basis for the academic session 2026–27. It does not provide any claim or right for permanent employment in Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for PGT and TGT posts in NVS Patna Region?
faq.answer: PGTs receive Rs. 35,750 per month at normal stations and Rs. 42,250 at hard stations. TGTs, Librarians and Staff Nurses receive Rs. 34,125 at normal stations and Rs. 40,625 at hard stations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for NVS Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age for PGTs, TGTs and Creative Teachers is 50 years as on 01 June 2026. For Staff Nurse, the maximum age is 35 years, while retired NVS teachers can apply up to 65 years.

faq.question: Q6. What are the qualifications required for PGT and TGT posts?
faq.answer: PGT candidates must have a Master’s degree with at least 50% marks along with B.Ed. TGT candidates need a Bachelor’s degree with B.Ed. and must have qualified CTET Paper-II.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NVS Patna Region Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes application scrutiny followed by personal interaction or interview. Shortlisted candidates will be called between 21 May and 23 May 2026 for verification and interaction.

faq.question: Q8. Do selected candidates need to stay in the school campus?
faq.answer: Yes, it is mandatory for selected candidates to reside within the Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya campus. This is part of the contractual engagement conditions.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online by registering on the official portal, filling in the required details, uploading documents and submitting the application form before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the NVS Patna Region Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be downloaded from the Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti Regional Office Patna website. It contains detailed information about eligibility, salary, selection process and application steps.
